entry.title: New: BILL059(24) (Honolulu) — Councilmember Nishimoto took office on January 2, 2025.
entry.content:
RELATING TO PLASTIC.

Phases in the prohibition of the sale, offering for sale, offer for use, and providing single use plastic bottles at any City facility, City-authorized concession, City-sponsored or City-permitted event, or City program.

Latest action: Councilmember Nishimoto took office on January 2, 2025.

View on the council site
